section.heading: Additional contribution to special funds; authorization of appropriations

paragraph.content: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to contribute on behalf of the United States $520,000,000 to the Asian Development Fund, a special fund of the Bank.
Any commitment to make the contribution authorized in paragraph (1) shall be made subject to obtaining the necessary appropriations.

subsection.content: In order to pay for the United States contribution to the Asian Development Fund provided for in this section, there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $520,000,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–369, § 28, as added Pub. L. 98–181, title I [title X, § 1002], Nov. 30, 1983, 97 Stat. 1286.)
